title: Lets hear it for 2022! 🎉

posts.author: elkemoshel (Elke Moshel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey monday sales CRM community,

Can you believe it’s almost 2023!?

Taking a moment to reflect upon yet another incredible year of the community, we’d love to hear about your most valuable/helpful best practice/workaround/tip&trick/automation you learned from the community?

Share your 2022 learnings in the thread below

Bonus - tag the community members who taught you that special something to show your appreciation!
